TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == "ci-hun" "kamu nu Zipun, „Éí„āę„Éę„Āģci, imi "kwang a wi-ci" , kwang-ce-ci" sa, malumanan a imi nu Taywan "cilin-wang" musaungayay mangga i tilibi i Taywan uyzaan tu ku nipatahkal "ci-lin-wang" ngangan nu iga situngusay uyaan kya misulitay ci Ku-tyen-yu-mey. u mangga ci Syaw-tyen-cyen ku misanga'ay mikulit tu nu Zipun a mangga. "ś£čť≠ā" . nilaculan i ci-ing-se-mangga zasya "Sinmun nu masakapahay JUMP" 1999 a mihca 2, 3 papulul han katukuh 2003 a mihca 33 bangguan matilin a patahkal. cacayay a cudad hamin 23 lulud. uyni a nisulitan napakala tu 2000 a mkihcaan tu saka 45 lekad adidi'ay a piazihan tu mangga, 2003 a mihcaan 7 lekad suw-cung-ce-huy lalangawan kawlah baluhay a kawlah. 2001 a mihcaan sumadan misilit tu tilibi musaungayay a mangga, u Tung-cin a tilibi,tyen-tung atu Studio Pierrot mapulung misanga' i Tung-cin tilibian "TXN' patahkal, palatusaen, pulung 7 aazihan. zpey-tuw-uma, 2004 a mihca 1 abulad 3 a demiad u Zipun ku patahkalay tu micidekay nisulitan tu OVN" "ci-hun Special, pazayza pey-tuw-pey a zazan", Syang-kang i 2004 a mihca 3 a bulad saayaway patahkal, 2006 a mihca 4 a bulad muliyaws patahkal. musaungayay a mangga caay kapicalap tu nisulitanaytu pey-tow-pey a zazan u kalepacaw nu tuluay a kanatal, katukuh pey-tow-pey u pidademec nu Zipun a pahezdek. u maliyuhay tu wi-ci ku adidi' nu micudaday tu enedm a mihca ku picudad nu micudaday cu Cin-ten-kwang, i luma' ni baki a sulu miadad mikilim maazih ku nu sumamadanay a wi-ci-ci-pan, ci Cin-ten-kwang maazih ci-panan ku izang ni Pen-ing-bang-siw-ce "Bu-ce-lang" madimut i labu nu ci-panay nu kasumamadan ci-s-ten-yen-cow a cumudan nu Di'tu ku uzip. ci ten-yen-cow sakay lihalay zidayay nu sitangahay a ci-s, mapaengad nu ada malibungaytu, cow malingec kinapatay satu, sakay amakatukuh ciniza sakatinengay a gicisu, i kitakit micalicali tu malebut a mihcaan, mihalhal muliyaw tu zuma a misyaci, amiedem tu nabalucu'an ni Cow misyaci, pateng mikelid ci Cowan tayza wi-ci-huy a misyaci, namahiza mademec tu ku malecaday a mihcaan nu sitangahay ci-s ci Ta-s-lyang. ci Ta-s-lyang u wi-ciay nu saayaway singanganay a tademaw Ta-s-lyang-hang-yang tatamaan a wawa, naadidi' mapasubana' nu ama, u tineng misyaci malakui' ku malecaday cinizaan, u sinmungay mikawaw a ci-s, nika mademec ni Cow miuculay ci Cin-ten-kwang. mateki'ay a lyang, sakay amilalaba' ci Cin-ten-kwang "Cow-wi", saicelang sa miecaw tu tineng nu ci. mabilil mapasaicelang ni Kwang ci Lyang, sisa manamu tu wi-ci, nipasubana' ni Cow atu piecaw, milabu tu sinmungay nu miwi-ciay, saca amisya-ci ci Cow nika namahiza caay tu kayadah. . pacukaymasen ni Kwang ci Cow tu "Sai" i ngangan nu wanglu wanglu wi-ci, malikalikad ku ngangan nu Sai, i pidekuan ni Ta-s-hang-yang sakay i caay pakademec, nika maazih ku cacayay cacay taneng pakademedc ci Ta-s-hang-yang ci fu-luan, ci Cow amatinedng ku uzip paazih ci Kwangan tuyni a pan-ci, kya I kitakit matenes tu malebu a mihcaan micalicali, caay akatenes malawpes tu, namahiza ci Kwang ales sat utu wi-ci, satu tacuwacuwa tu mikilim tu adingu ni Cow. nipaicelang nu katuuday atu pikelid, maazih tu ci Kwang ciow makay tuteneng mici mipulung tu nu uzipzy a ci-i, malaheci tu ku kabiyalawan. zikuz, i pisinmung miwi-ci, ci Kwang lalid sa mikilul tu cayay kalecad nu matinengay micuay ci ian, satu ci Ta-s-lyang mapulunng mikilim matinen gay misya-ci. ŚÖČŤģďšĹźÁāļšĹŅÁĒ®"sai"ÁāļÁ∂≤ŚźćšłčÁ∂≤Ť∑ĮŚúćś£č,sai ,sai isyašłč, . GOGO ci-lin-wang GOGOś£čťĚąÁéč musaungayay a mangga zikuz kamu nu iga izaw ingatu ku "Mey-ce-yu syang-liay a GOGO ci-lin-wang "Mey-ce-yu-syang-li GOGO ci-li-wang kun-ci", Mey-ce-yu-syang-li ci-s atu tatusa adidi'ay nu minanamay syaw-u atu icelang musakmu paazih tu wi-ci tyenen g nu saayaway minanam. sinkamukuay namitakus itawyaay uyni bang-cya-ten-cen-bu atu baluhaw saayaway a ci-s ci Cin-san-i-tay milihiza tu kamuku mapazizaw. hwa-se saayaway patahkal tu "ci-hun" tilibi nu misaungayay a mangga, caay a igaan a zikuz micunus patahkal hwa-se subangkaw "ayza pasubana' sakawawan" nisanga'an patahkal tu adiwawa wi-ci pasubana' a kamuku "wi-ci 123', u kamu wi-ci 123, madayum ku minanamay" Wang-li-lin uzip "Vicky a saydan" mala mitelungay, itawya Cong-hwa-min-kow wi-ci-sye-huy misu-cang ci Cin-s-min " Taywan sinmungay ci-s a ama ci Cin-s" mala pitengilan. 2003 a mihcaan l hamin tulu a igaan tu VCO. "VickyŤÄĀŚłę" 3ÁČáVCD. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == " ¶i-ńßun" "kamu nu zipun, **** ¶i, imi "kwaŇč a wi- ¶i" , kwaŇč- ¶…ô- ¶i" sa, mar~…ĺumanan a imi nu tajwan " ¶ir~…ĺin-waŇč" musauŇčajaj maŇčga i tir~…ĺibi i tajwan ujzaan tu ku nipatańßkar~…ĺ " ¶i-r~…ĺin-waŇč" ŇčaŇčan nu iga situŇčusaj ujaan kja misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ku-tj…ôn-ju-m…ô. u maŇčga ¶i sjaw-tj…ôn- ¶j…ôn ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj mikur~…ĺit tu nu zipun a maŇčga. "**" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan i ¶i-iŇč-s…ô-maŇčga zasja "sinmun nu masakapańßaj *ump" **** a mińß ¶a *, * papur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** baŇčguan matir~…ĺin a patańßkar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶udad ńßamin ** r~…ĺur~…ĺud. ujni a nisur~…ĺitan napakar~…ĺa tu **** a mkińß ¶aan tu saka ** r~…ĺ…ôkad adidi Ē~ °aj a piazińßan tu maŇčga, **** a mińß ¶aan * r~…ĺ…ôkad suw- ¶uŇč- ¶…ô-ńßuj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan kawr~…ĺańß bar~…ĺuńßaj a kawr~…ĺańß. **** a mińß ¶aan sumadan misir~…ĺit tu tir~…ĺibi musauŇčajaj a maŇčga, u tuŇč- ¶in a tir~…ĺibi,tj…ôn-tuŇč atu studio pi…ôrrot mapur~…ĺuŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° i tuŇč- ¶in tir~…ĺibian "t*n Ē~ ° patańßkar~…ĺ, par~…ĺatusa…ôn, pur~…ĺuŇč * aazińßan. zp…ô-tuw-uma, **** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad u zipun ku patańßkar~…ĺaj tu mi ¶id…ôkaj nisur~…ĺitan tu o*n" " ¶i-ńßun sp…ô ¶iar~…ĺ, pazajza p…ô-tuw-p…ô a zazan", sjaŇč-kaŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mur~…ĺijaws patańßkar~…ĺ. musauŇčajaj a maŇčga ¶aaj kapi ¶ar~…ĺap tu nisur~…ĺitanajtu p…ô-tow-p…ô a zazan u kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu tur~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺ, katukuńß p…ô-tow-p…ô u pidad…ôm…ô ¶ nu zipun a pańß…ôzd…ôk. u mar~…ĺijuńßaj tu wi- ¶i ku adidi Ē~ ° nu mi ¶udadaj tu …ôn…ôdm a mińß ¶a ku pi ¶udad nu mi ¶udadaj ¶u ¶in-t…ôn-kwaŇč, i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni baki a sur~…ĺu miadad mikir~…ĺim maazińß ku nu sumamadanaj a wi- ¶i- ¶i-pan, ¶i ¶in-t…ôn-kwaŇč maazińß ¶i-panan ku izaŇč ni p…ôn-iŇč-baŇč-siw- ¶…ô "bu- ¶…ô-r~…ĺaŇč" madimut i r~…ĺabu nu ¶i-panaj nu kasumamadan ¶i-s-t…ôn-j…ôn- ¶ow a ¶umudan nu di Ē~ °tu ku uzip. ¶i t…ôn-j…ôn- ¶ow sakaj r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj zidajaj nu sitaŇčańßaj a ¶i-s, mapa…ôŇčad nu ada mar~…ĺibuŇčajtu, ¶ow mar~…ĺiŇč…ô ¶ kinapataj satu, sakaj amakatukuńß ¶iniza sakatin…ôŇčaj a gi ¶isu, i kitakit mi ¶ar~…ĺi ¶ar~…ĺi tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan, mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ mur~…ĺijaw tu zuma a misja ¶i, ami…ôd…ôm tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an ni ¶ow misja ¶i, pat…ôŇč mik…ôr~…ĺid ¶i ¶owan tajza wi- ¶i-ńßuj a misja ¶i, namańßiza mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a mińß ¶aan nu sitaŇčańßaj ¶i-s ¶i ta-s-r~…ĺjaŇč. ¶i ta-s-r~…ĺjaŇč u wi- ¶iaj nu saajawaj siŇčaŇčanaj a tad…ômaw ta-s-r~…ĺjaŇč-ńßaŇč-jaŇč tatamaan a wawa, naadidi Ē~ ° mapasubana Ē~ ° nu ama, u tin…ôŇč misja ¶i mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ¶inizaan, u sinmuŇčaj mikawaw a ¶i-s, nika mad…ôm…ô ¶ ni ¶ow miu ¶ur~…ĺaj ¶i ¶in-t…ôn-kwaŇč. mat…ôki Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺjaŇč, sakaj amir~…ĺar~…ĺaba Ē~ ° ¶i ¶in-t…ôn-kwaŇč " ¶ow-wi", sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa mi…ô ¶aw tu tin…ôŇč nu ¶i. mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ mapasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni kwaŇč ¶i r~…ĺjaŇč, sisa manamu tu wi- ¶i, nipasubana Ē~ ° ni ¶ow atu pi…ô ¶aw, mir~…ĺabu tu sinmuŇčaj nu miwi- ¶iaj, sa ¶a amisja- ¶i ¶i ¶ow nika namańßiza ¶aaj tu kajadańß. . pa ¶ukajmas…ôn ni kwaŇč ¶i ¶ow tu "sai" i ŇčaŇčan nu waŇčr~…ĺu waŇčr~…ĺu wi- ¶i, mar~…ĺikar~…ĺikad ku ŇčaŇčan nu sai, i pid…ôkuan ni ta-s-ńßaŇč-jaŇč sakaj i ¶aaj pakad…ôm…ô ¶, nika maazińß ku ¶a ¶ajaj ¶a ¶aj tan…ôŇč pakad…ôm…ôd ¶ ¶i ta-s-ńßaŇč-jaŇč ¶i fu-r~…ĺuan, ¶i ¶ow amatin…ôdŇč ku uzip paazińß ¶i kwaŇčan tujni a pan- ¶i, kja i kitakit mat…ôn…ôs tu mar~…ĺ…ôbu a mińß ¶aan mi ¶ar~…ĺi ¶ar~…ĺi, ¶aaj akat…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu, namańßiza ¶i kwaŇč ar~…ĺ…ôs sat utu wi- ¶i, satu ta ¶uwa ¶uwa tu mikir~…ĺim tu adiŇču ni ¶ow. nipai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu katuudaj atu pik…ôr~…ĺid, maazińß tu ¶i kwaŇč ¶iow makaj tut…ôn…ôŇč mi ¶i mipur~…ĺuŇč tu nu uzipzj a ¶i-i, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu ku kabijar~…ĺawan. zikuz, i pisinmuŇč miwi- ¶i, ¶i kwaŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu matin…ôŇčaj mi ¶uaj ¶i ian, satu ¶i ta-s-r~…ĺjaŇč mapur~…ĺunŇč mikir~…ĺim matin…ôn gaj misja- ¶i. ******"sai"********,sai ,sai isja*, . gogo ¶i-r~…ĺin-waŇč gogo*** musauŇčajaj a maŇčga zikuz kamu nu iga izaw iŇčatu ku "m…ô- ¶…ô-ju sjaŇč-r~…ĺiaj a gogo ¶i-r~…ĺin-waŇč "m…ô- ¶…ô-ju-sjaŇč-r~…ĺi gogo ¶i-r~…ĺi-waŇč kun- ¶i", m…ô- ¶…ô-ju-sjaŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i-s atu tatusa adidi Ē~ °aj nu minanamaj sjaw-u atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč musakmu paazińß tu wi- ¶i tj…ôn…ôn g nu saajawaj minanam. sinkamukuaj namitakus itawjaaj ujni baŇč- ¶ja-t…ôn- ¶…ôn-bu atu bar~…ĺuńßaw saajawaj a ¶i-s ¶i ¶in-san-i-taj mir~…ĺińßiza tu kamuku mapazizaw. ńßwa-s…ô saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu " ¶i-ńßun" tir~…ĺibi nu misauŇčajaj a maŇčga, ¶aaj a igaan a zikuz mi ¶unus patańßkar~…ĺ ńßwa-s…ô subaŇčkaw "ajza pasubana Ē~ ° sakawawan" nisaŇča Ē~ °an patańßkar~…ĺ tu adiwawa wi- ¶i pasubana Ē~ ° a kamuku "wi- ¶i *** Ē~ °, u kamu wi- ¶i ***, madajum ku minanamaj" waŇč-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺin uzip "*i ¶kj a sajdan" mar~…ĺa mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj, itawja ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow wi- ¶i-sj…ô-ńßuj misu- ¶aŇč ¶i ¶in-s-min " tajwan sinmuŇčaj ¶i-s a ama ¶i ¶in-s" mar~…ĺa pit…ôŇčir~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ ńßamin tur~…ĺu a igaan tu * ¶o. "*i ¶kj**" *** ¶d. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == "ci-hun" "kamu nu Zipun, „Éí„āę„Éę„Āģci, imi "kwang a wi-ci" , kwang-ce-ci" sa, malumanan a imi nu Taywan "cilin-wang" musaungayay mangga i tilibi i Taywan uyzaan tu ku nipatahkal "ci-lin-wang" ngangan nu iga situngusay uyaan kya misulitay ci Ku-tyen-yu-mey. u mangga ci Syaw-tyen-cyen ku misanga'ay mikulit tu nu Zipun a mangga. "ś£čť≠ā" . nilaculan i ci-ing-se-mangga zasya "Sinmun nu masakapahay JUMP" 1999 a mihca 2, 3 papulul han katukuh 2003 a mihca 33 bangguan matilin a patahkal. cacayay a cudad hamin 23 lulud. uyni a nisulitan napakala tu 2000 a mkihcaan tu saka 45 lekad adidi'ay a piazihan tu mangga, 2003 a mihcaan 7 lekad suw-cung-ce-huy lalangawan kawlah baluhay a kawlah. 2001 a mihcaan sumadan misilit tu tilibi musaungayay a mangga, u Tung-cin a tilibi,tyen-tung atu Studio Pierrot mapulung misanga' i Tung-cin tilibian "TXN' patahkal, palatusaen, pulung 7 aazihan. zpey-tuw-uma, 2004 a mihca 1 abulad 3 a demiad u Zipun ku patahkalay tu micidekay nisulitan tu OVN" "ci-hun Special, pazayza pey-tuw-pey a zazan", Syang-kang i 2004 a mihca 3 a bulad saayaway patahkal, 2006 a mihca 4 a bulad muliyaws patahkal. musaungayay a mangga caay kapicalap tu nisulitanaytu pey-tow-pey a zazan u kalepacaw nu tuluay a kanatal, katukuh pey-tow-pey u pidademec nu Zipun a pahezdek. u maliyuhay tu wi-ci ku adidi' nu micudaday tu enedm a mihca ku picudad nu micudaday cu Cin-ten-kwang, i luma' ni baki a sulu miadad mikilim maazih ku nu sumamadanay a wi-ci-ci-pan, ci Cin-ten-kwang maazih ci-panan ku izang ni Pen-ing-bang-siw-ce "Bu-ce-lang" madimut i labu nu ci-panay nu kasumamadan ci-s-ten-yen-cow a cumudan nu Di'tu ku uzip. ci ten-yen-cow sakay lihalay zidayay nu sitangahay a ci-s, mapaengad nu ada malibungaytu, cow malingec kinapatay satu, sakay amakatukuh ciniza sakatinengay a gicisu, i kitakit micalicali tu malebut a mihcaan, mihalhal muliyaw tu zuma a misyaci, amiedem tu nabalucu'an ni Cow misyaci, pateng mikelid ci Cowan tayza wi-ci-huy a misyaci, namahiza mademec tu ku malecaday a mihcaan nu sitangahay ci-s ci Ta-s-lyang. ci Ta-s-lyang u wi-ciay nu saayaway singanganay a tademaw Ta-s-lyang-hang-yang tatamaan a wawa, naadidi' mapasubana' nu ama, u tineng misyaci malakui' ku malecaday cinizaan, u sinmungay mikawaw a ci-s, nika mademec ni Cow miuculay ci Cin-ten-kwang. mateki'ay a lyang, sakay amilalaba' ci Cin-ten-kwang "Cow-wi", saicelang sa miecaw tu tineng nu ci. mabilil mapasaicelang ni Kwang ci Lyang, sisa manamu tu wi-ci, nipasubana' ni Cow atu piecaw, milabu tu sinmungay nu miwi-ciay, saca amisya-ci ci Cow nika namahiza caay tu kayadah. . pacukaymasen ni Kwang ci Cow tu "Sai" i ngangan nu wanglu wanglu wi-ci, malikalikad ku ngangan nu Sai, i pidekuan ni Ta-s-hang-yang sakay i caay pakademec, nika maazih ku cacayay cacay taneng pakademedc ci Ta-s-hang-yang ci fu-luan, ci Cow amatinedng ku uzip paazih ci Kwangan tuyni a pan-ci, kya I kitakit matenes tu malebu a mihcaan micalicali, caay akatenes malawpes tu, namahiza ci Kwang ales sat utu wi-ci, satu tacuwacuwa tu mikilim tu adingu ni Cow. nipaicelang nu katuuday atu pikelid, maazih tu ci Kwang ciow makay tuteneng mici mipulung tu nu uzipzy a ci-i, malaheci tu ku kabiyalawan. zikuz, i pisinmung miwi-ci, ci Kwang lalid sa mikilul tu cayay kalecad nu matinengay micuay ci ian, satu ci Ta-s-lyang mapulunng mikilim matinen gay misya-ci. ŚÖČŤģďšĹźÁāļšĹŅÁĒ®"sai"ÁāļÁ∂≤ŚźćšłčÁ∂≤Ť∑ĮŚúćś£č,sai ,sai isyašłč, . GOGO ci-lin-wang GOGOś£čťĚąÁéč musaungayay a mangga zikuz kamu nu iga izaw ingatu ku "Mey-ce-yu syang-liay a GOGO ci-lin-wang "Mey-ce-yu-syang-li GOGO ci-li-wang kun-ci", Mey-ce-yu-syang-li ci-s atu tatusa adidi'ay nu minanamay syaw-u atu icelang musakmu paazih tu wi-ci tyenen g nu saayaway minanam. sinkamukuay namitakus itawyaay uyni bang-cya-ten-cen-bu atu baluhaw saayaway a ci-s ci Cin-san-i-tay milihiza tu kamuku mapazizaw. hwa-se saayaway patahkal tu "ci-hun" tilibi nu misaungayay a mangga, caay a igaan a zikuz micunus patahkal hwa-se subangkaw "ayza pasubana' sakawawan" nisanga'an patahkal tu adiwawa wi-ci pasubana' a kamuku "wi-ci 123', u kamu wi-ci 123, madayum ku minanamay" Wang-li-lin uzip "Vicky a saydan" mala mitelungay, itawya Cong-hwa-min-kow wi-ci-sye-huy misu-cang ci Cin-s-min " Taywan sinmungay ci-s a ama ci Cin-s" mala pitengilan. 2003 a mihcaan l hamin tulu a igaan tu VCO. "VickyŤÄĀŚłę" 3ÁČáVCD. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

"**" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan i ¶i-iŇč-s…ô-maŇčga zasja "sinmun nu masakapańßaj *ump" **** a mińß ¶a *, * papur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** baŇčguan matir~…ĺin a patańßkar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶udad tir~…ĺibian "t*n Ē~ ° patańßkar~…ĺ, par~…ĺatusa…ôn, pur~…ĺuŇč * aazińßan. zp…ô-tuw-uma, **** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad u zipun ku patańßkar~…ĺaj tu mi ¶id…ôkaj nisur~…ĺitan tu o*n" " ¶i-ńßun
